message:
test(tui): improve spinner test coverage and fix model optimization

- Add spinner visibility tests for loading states (usage, sync panels)
- Fix spinner_test.go: NoColor spinners are still animated, just unstyled
- Add TestE2E_LoadingSpinnerVisible to verify spinner renders during async ops
- Add TestThemeOptionsFromEnv_ReducedMotion for accessibility setting
- Optimize model.go: only forward spinner ticks to visible panels

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
